topContent.text:
**Already have access?**  
 
 Please choose one of the following login options: 
 * Sign in with Google or Microsoft if your MC2DP access is linked to it. 
 * Sign in via InCommon if your organization is part of the InCommon Federation. 
 * Sign in with ORCID if you have an ORCID ID; please provide it to the MC2DP admin beforehand.

bottomContent.text:
**Need Access?**  
 
 Submit a request by filling out form, and our team will review it. You will be notified via email once your access is approved. [Request access to MC2DP](https://forms.gle/gHkKB2HzpBhUbymS6)  
 
 For details, see our [Documentation Page](https://uc-cdis.github.io/mc2dp-docs/). Questions? Email [mc2dp@occ-data.org](mailto:mc2dp@occ-data.org).
